data.name: Horny Jail
data.detailed_description:
About This Game

Horny Jail: Conjugal Visits

You're a new guard at Horny Jail—the meme prison where the horniest offenders are sent. Your job is to supervise conjugal visits and "definitely NOT" participate. Problem: every inmate is insanely hot and determined to corrupt you. Can you survive your first week without getting "bonked" yourself?

Game Overview

Horny Jail: Conjugal Visits is a comedy dating sim visual novel that turns the "go to horny jail" meme into an absurd, sexy adventure. Navigate your duties as a prison guard while five beautiful inmates try to seduce you—and your stern warden boss keeps catching you at the worst moments.

Features

- Five Hot Inmates: Each with their own seduction style

- Bambi (The Innocent): Pastel pink hair, acts innocent but is secretly the horniest one. "Uwu, I didn't mean to~"

- Valentina (The Seductress): Red hair, zero shame, treats conjugal visits like a sport. Openly flirty and confident.

- Jade (The Reformed): Black hair, glasses, claims she's changed and found Jesus. Definitely hasn't. Librarian energy gone wrong.

- Cherry (The First-Timer): Blonde, nervous newbie who YOU accidentally corrupt through "training." Too pure for this place (for now).

- Scarlett (The Repeat Offender): Purple hair with undercut, been here 47 times, basically runs the place. Knows where the cameras don't reach.

- Warden Steele: Your stern boss who keeps catching you. Silver hair, glasses, clipboard always in hand. Secretly jealous of the inmates.

- Comedy & Romance: Experience absurd situations where every "innocent" interaction turns into a seduction attempt. Meme-heavy dialogue and fourth-wall breaking humor.

- Multiple Endings: Will you resist temptation? Give in to one inmate? Or get caught by the warden? Your choices determine your fate.

- Horny Jail Locations: Explore the pastel pink prison facility with heart-shaped bars, conjugal visit rooms, shower areas, cafeteria, and the warden's office.

Story

You just got hired as a guard at Horny Jail—the internet's favorite meme prison. Your first day, you meet five inmates who are way too attractive for their own good. Your job is simple: supervise conjugal visits and maintain order. But when every inmate is determined to seduce you, and your warden keeps walking in at the worst moments, surviving your first week becomes a challenge.

Can you resist temptation? Or will you end up in horny jail yourself?

Content Warning

This game contains mature themes including explicit sexual content, adult situations, and NSFW scenes. Recommended for mature audiences only (18+).

data.short_description: A comedy dating sim visual novel where you supervise conjugal visits as a new guard at Horny Jail. Navigate seduction attempts from five hot inmates, make choices that determine your fate, and resist temptation—or give in—in this meme-based romantic comedy adventure.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOs 10.10 or later
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04.7 or later
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
